symptoms.name: PC Won't Power On
symptoms.description: Nothing happens when pressing the power button — no lights, no fans, no sounds.

symptoms.name: Random Shutdowns Under Load
symptoms.description: System turns off instantly (black screen) during gaming, rendering, or heavy benchmarks.

symptoms.name: Burning Smell or Smoke
symptoms.description: Odor of hot plastic, electrical burning, or visible smoke coming from the chassis.

symptoms.name: Loud Squealing or Coil Whine
symptoms.description: High-pitched buzzing or whistling sound coming from the power supply under load.

symptoms.name: Frequent BSODs or Reboots
symptoms.description: System crashes to a Blue Screen of Death or reboots with hardware-related errors.

symptoms.name: PSU Fan Not Spinning
symptoms.description: The cooling fan inside the power supply remains completely stationary.

no-power.text: Do any motherboard LEDs light up or do fans twitch briefly when pressing the power button?

options.text: Absolutely nothing happens (no lights, no movement)
Fans spin for a split-second and then stop instantly
Motherboard standby LEDs are ON, but the power button does nothing

no-power.text: Have you attempted the PSU Paperclip Test (bridging PS-ON pin 16 to COM ground)?

options.text: Yes, the PSU fan spun up and stayed running
Yes, the PSU fan did not spin or stopped immediately
No, I have not performed this test

shutdown-load.text: What is the exact behavior of the system during a shutdown?

options.text: Instant black screen, power cuts off completely (like a power outage)
System freezes, audio loops, or shows a Blue Screen before rebooting
PC reboots instantly with no screen freeze (sudden restart)

shutdown-load.text: When does the shutdown typically occur?

options.text: Immediately upon launching a heavy 3D game or benchmark
Randomly, even while browsing the web or sitting idle

coil-whine.text: Does the pitch or volume of the whine change with your in-game frame rates?

options.text: Yes, it gets louder in game menus or at high FPS (>200 FPS)
No, it is a constant hum or buzz regardless of workload

bsod-instability.text: What is the primary error message shown on the Blue Screen?

fan-issues.text: What efficiency class or model series is your power supply?

options.text: Gold/Platinum premium model (e.g. Corsair RMx, Seasonic Focus)
